name: Content Alchemy
description: Turn articles, web pages, PDFs, and excerpts into structured notes, key insights, actionable next steps, and reusable takeaways.
author: Lucas
positioning: Transform reading input into personal outcomes instead of plain summaries.
core_value: Help users turn what they read into outcomes they can retain, revisit, act on, and reuse.
differentiation: Reconstructs structure instead of only compressing information
Extracts insight instead of listing points mechanically
Pushes toward action instead of stopping at understanding
Produces reusable takeaways instead of disposable summaries
Routes web URLs into the same transformation workflow
Routes PDFs into the same transformation workflow
Uses page-aware routing for long PDFs instead of stuffing everything into context
Persists long-PDF reading progress and supports resume flows
